trade_area_note: Channel-side & Water Street hospitality / affluent spend thesis: prioritize maritime-adjacent corridors (Channelside, Channel District, Sparkman Wharf, Water Street Tampa) — not generic ‘downtown Tampa’ without water or district specificity. Stadium halos: Amalie Arena (NHL) + Raymond James (NFL) as metro calendar overlays; USF Tampa + future on-campus stadium (fall 2027 target) as emerging programmed calendar—verify construction / NCAA schedule commercially.
primary_stadiums_arenas: Amalie Arena — 401 Channelside Dr, Tampa (Tampa Bay Lightning; walkable Channelside cluster)
Raymond James Stadium — 4201 N Dale Mabry Hwy (Tampa Bay Buccaneers; northwest Tampa—rideshare halo, not walking-distance to Channelside)
USF on-campus football stadium — opening targeted fall 2027 (programming TBD; desk confidence medium until NCAA schedules firm)
premium_hotel_clusters: Water Street Tampa / JW Marriott / W Tampa / Edition-adjacent hospitality stack
Channelside / cruise port strip — hotels serving port, aquarium, arena walk-offs
Downtown core — office towers with ground-floor hospitality (corporate podium review applies)
channel_waterfront_corridors: Sparkman Wharf — container-hall restaurants + waterfront lawn (channelside spend gravity)
Garrison Channel / Ybor Channel adjacency — nautical spine for brand thesis
Riverwalk / Curtis Hixon waterfront (secondary vs Channelside for channel thesis but relevant for convention spill)
high_wealth_corridors: Hyde Park / SoHo discretionary retail spill (south of downtown—not primary channel thesis but wealth pool)
Harbour Island / Davis Islands waterfront residential (evening-trip rideshare into Channelside / Downtown)
collegiate_bar_district_avoid: Ybor late-night volume strips where enforcement and crowd mix skew ‘volume bar’ vs affluent celebration (block-by-block; some blocks viable—scout neighbor nuisance before underwriting patio bass)
receipts_notes: Florida has no Texas Comptroller-style statewide mixed-beverage gross receipts portal. Receipt ‘proof’ for spend gravity uses broker OM, subscriber comps (CoStar/Crexi), operator interviews, Beverage Journal / DOT industry lists, City of Tampa / Hillsborough permit activity, and Sunbiz filings—document confidence tier honestly.
permit_portal_hints: City of Tampa — Accela / Development Coordination online (permits & entitlement research)
Hillsborough County Land Use / zoning layers — verify parcel zoning letter before outdoor amplification thesis
Florida Building Code / Broward-style overlay not identical — Hillsborough noise nuisance + Tampa municipal code for amplified entertainment (parcel-specific)
noise_entertainment_search_queries: City of Tampa noise ordinance amplified sound outdoor dining
Hillsborough County Florida outdoor entertainment permit restaurant
Tampa special event permit amplified music Channel District
Tampa historic district certificate of appropriateness Ybor City
metro_event_calendar_hints: https://www.waterstreettampa.com/ — district events + retail leasing context
